goal: Build the minimal validation harness and run the 30-task sequence to test whether competence compounds (ADR-0002).
acceptance_tests: harness runs one task end-to-end and logs cost (incl. effector), wall-clock, gate pass/fail, effector retries, prior-craft reuse count

a results report evaluates all three pass criteria: negative cost-per-task slope after warm-up; non-decreasing gate pass-rate with falling effector retries; measurable reuse of earlier orchestration craft
an explicit pass/stop decision is recorded
